name: mailtapper
description: An access layer for email — connect any IMAP mailbox and read it as clean, unified JSON.

scripts.dev: doppler run -p mailtapper -c dev -- tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.db:generate: doppler run -p mailtapper -c dev -- drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: doppler run -p mailtapper -c dev -- drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:push: doppler run -p mailtapper -c dev -- drizzle-kit push
scripts.seed: doppler run -p mailtapper -c dev -- tsx src/scripts/seed.ts
scripts.issue-key: doppler run -p mailtapper -c dev -- tsx src/scripts/issue-key.ts
